title: 2025: The Untold Stories of Check Point Research

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — 2025: The Untold Stories of Check Point Research
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/10
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*100ww.msi*'
            - '*4sync.com*'
            - '*join.html*'
            - '*production.dav.indeedex.workers*'
            - '*tax.gov.ua*'
            - '*web.core.windows.net*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
rules.yara:
rule CDB_APEX_2025__The_Untold_Stories_of_Check_Point_ {
    meta:
        description = "2025: The Untold Stories of Check Point Research"
        author = "CyberDudeBivash"
    strings:
        $h0 = "1f3bd755de24e00af2dba61f938637d1cc0fbfd6166dba014e665033ad4445c0" ascii nocase
        $h1 = "262a1003a2cd04993b29e687686eba573d6202fea8611c437ecbd6312802677a" ascii nocase
        $h2 = "549df969dc5b340b4fc850584a01c767ca8a1bd712f16210f164f85e26c3e58b" ascii nocase
        $h3 = "6eb7dbf27a25639c7f11c05fd88ea2a301e0ca93d3c3bdee1eb5917fc60a56ff" ascii nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
